# Workspace Instructions

- Store all future accounting-generated Markdown files in `accounting-log/`.
- This includes accounting changelogs, accounting plans, accounting API guides, accounting test-data docs, and similar generated `.md` files.
- Do not place new accounting log or accounting documentation files at the repository root unless the user explicitly requests it.
- When referencing accounting documentation locations in new docs, use `accounting-log/` as the canonical folder.
